title: Project X
subtitle: Teaching Intelligence Platform
description: A professional teaching operating system combining a recruiter portfolio with curriculum, assessment, revision, question-bank, analytics, AI and evidence tools.

apps.title: Professional Portfolio Home
apps.description: Main landing page for recruiters, schools and professional contacts.

apps.title: Career Profile
apps.description: Career history, experience, salary expectations and relocation preferences.

apps.title: Teaching Evidence Centre
apps.description: Lesson observation, QTS evidence, resources, reflection and supporting evidence.

apps.title: Professional Recommendations
apps.description: Professional references, recommendation form and published testimonials.

apps.title: AI in Education
apps.description: AI-supported teaching, curriculum design and educational innovation.

apps.title: QTS Evidence
apps.description: Assessment Only QTS evidence, observation materials and final recommendation status.

apps.title: Observation Dashboards
apps.description: Interactive observation dashboards, lesson evidence maps and supporting documentation.

apps.title: Curriculum Centre
apps.description: Curriculum maps, schemes of work, lesson sequencing and subject coverage.

apps.title: Assessment Centre
apps.description: Assessment tracking, marks analysis, feedback workflows and progress evidence.

apps.title: Revision Centre
apps.description: Revision resources, exam preparation, topic checklists and student study pathways.

apps.title: Question Banks
apps.description: Reusable questions, exam-style prompts, quizzes and retrieval practice resources.

apps.title: Teaching Tools
apps.description: Classroom utilities, lesson support tools, templates and reusable teaching assets.

apps.title: Evidence Centre
apps.description: Project X workspace for QTS, observations, standards, reflection and evidence artefacts.

apps.title: AI Lab
apps.description: AI experiments for lesson planning, feedback, differentiation and resource generation.

apps.title: Analytics
apps.description: Teaching analytics, assessment insights, curriculum coverage and evidence summaries.

apps.title: Administration
apps.description: Administrative tools, settings, configuration and platform management.
